reason: Bitcoin demonstrates strong resilience, holding $71,000 despite escalating geopolitical tensions. The positive developments in regulatory clarity (Fed master account) and institutional adoption of tokenized assets (Circle's growth) provide a bullish undertone for the broader crypto market. However, significant geopolitical risks remain, and while Bitcoin has shown robustness, specific systemic vulnerabilities, though remote, warrant continuous monitoring. The current phase appears to be one of accumulation, building a strong base before a potential further move up, but significant external factors introduce volatility.
headlines: Bitcoin holds $71,000 despite Trump warning of strikes on Iran's oil-rich Kharg Island
Bitcoin can survive 72% of the world's submarine cables being cut, but a targeted attack on five hosting providers could cripple it
A huge gap between network use and token value is the most important thing happening in XRP right now
Court closes Custodia fight with Federal Reserve just as Fed opens master-account door
Circle overtakes BlackRock in tokenized Treasuries as market hits record $11 billion
